howItWorks.intro: This game server cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly Cost = (RAM x $4 + Cores x $8) x Hosting Multiplier x Location Multiplier
RAM Needed = Players x RAM-per-Player Factor
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: How much RAM does a game server need?
faq.answer: Minecraft: 1-2GB for 10 players, 4-8GB for 30+. FPS games: 2-4GB for most. Survival games (Rust, ARK): 8-16GB for 30+ players. More mods/plugins = more RAM needed.

faq.question: Should I use a managed host or VPS?
faq.answer: Managed hosts are easiest — one-click setup, auto-updates, game panel included. VPS is cheaper but requires Linux knowledge. Dedicated servers offer best performance for large communities (50+ regular players).

faq.question: Is the Game Server Cost Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What max player slots should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate max player slots value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Game Server Cost Calculator?
sections.body: The Game Server Cost Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your max player slots, game type, hosting type, you get instant results including estimated monthly cost, ram recommended, cpu recommended. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting estimated monthly cost right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your max player slots and need to find the right estimated monthly cost. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Max Player Slots
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your max player slots — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: game type, hosting type, server location. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your estimated monthly cost, ram recommended, cpu recommended. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your max player slots before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both estimated monthly cost and ram recommended — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to get accurate results.
If you're unsure about your server location, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
